transferDepositSwitch.Title: Let’s manage your direct deposit
transferDepositSwitch.SubTitle: Allow Finicity, a Mastercard company to direct you to Atomic to securely connect to your payroll provider and manage changes to your direct deposit.
Steps: Search for your employer or payroll provider
Log in to your payroll provider
Confirm your new direct deposit allocation

transferBillPaySwitch.Title: Let’s manage your bill payments
transferBillPaySwitch.SubTitle: Allow Finicity, a Mastercard Company to direct you to Atomic to securely connect to your merchant(s) and update your payment method on file.
Steps: Select one or more recurring payments
Sign in to your accounts and link your card or bank account to each payment
